description: The Autonomous Quote Agent system uses a multi-agent AI pipeline to automate insurance processing efficiently. It integrates machine learning, decision systems, and orchestration frameworks to optimize risk assessment, pricing, and conversion. This reduces manual effort while improving accuracy and business outcomes.
Geology-constrained machine learning framework for TOC prediction (CAGEO submission)

This project is a Machine Learning-based web application that predicts the price of a car based on various features such as brand, year, fuel type, and more. The model is trained using a dataset of used cars and deployed using a Flask web framework to provide real-time predictions through a user-friendly interface.

A Machine Learning/Deep Learning framework for detecting Advanced Persistent Threats (APTs) using CSE-CIC-IDS2018 & CIC-IDS2017 dataset. Features data preprocessing, feature engineering, and ensemble model evaluation in a Jupyter environment.
Code and data for A Machine Learning Framework for Estimating Multi-Layer Root Zone Soil Moisture on the Loess Plateau Using Bias-Corrected ERA5-Land Reanalysis Data

This project focuses on predicting the electronic bandgap of MetalOrganic Frameworks (MOFs) using machine learning models trained on a large-scale dataset of approximately 20,000 structures. The goal is to explore how structural and compositional features influence material properties and to compare the performance of different ML approaches.
This project builds a framework for forward prediction and reverse design of n-type TOPCon (Tunnel Oxide Passivated Contact) solar cells based on machine learning methods
LifeLine AI: Emergency Response Time Optimizer LifeLine AI is an end-to-end machine learning framework designed to minimize emergency response times for ambulances and fire services.

Builds a market risk framework for U.S. Treasury yields using Factor Analysis to extract latent drivers, Agglomerative Clustering for regime detection, and Isolation Forest for tail events; explains ~70% of covariance.
Physics-informed machine learning framework for predicting and reducing harmonic distortion (THD) in residential power systems using AO-NFRS and Bayesian-optimized ANFIS.
Phishing website detection using machine learning with a Weighted Hybrid Score framework
Hybrid GeoAI and Generative AI system for pluvial flood susceptibility prediction and sustainable decision support using machine learning!
A practical framework for AI-Assisted Research in Mathematics and Machine Learning
A curated list of awesome agentic machine learning projects, frameworks, and resources.
A rust powered machine learning framework for python
Keep track of the newest machine learning frameworks on GitHub

E2E (Easy to Ensemble) is a novel R package designed to provide a comprehensive and flexible framework for ensemble machine learning, specifically tailored for medical applications like diagnosis and prognosis.
A Python framework for selecting fair and accurate Machine Learning models using Pareto Frontier and TOPSIS multicriteria decision-making, supporting various normalization techniques.

SexpOps is a comprehensive machine learning operator library implemented in pure Common Lisp. It provides a complete tensor computation framework with automatic differentiation capabilities, making it suitable for building and training neural networks from scratch.
Framework for solving discrete optimization problems using a combination of Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MIP) and Machine Learning (ML)
Este repositrio  um framework completo para Viso Computacional e Machine Learning, focado na captura e classificao de gestos das mos atravs de webcam.
A high-performance, low-latency machine learning model serving framework built in Rust.
A comprehensive ranking and evaluation framework for machine learning models and algorithms
KetML is a python machine learning framework with an OpenCL backend

This repository provides the code for the study Estimating Immune Age from B-Cell Receptor Repertoire Using Machine Learning. It implements an end-to-end framework for extracting multi-dimensional bulk BCR repertoire features and training machine learning models to quantify immunosenescence.

A Carbon-Aware DevOps framework designed to optimize energy efficiency in AI-driven crop yield prediction. This project implements GreenOps principles to minimize the environmental footprint of machine learning pipelines while maintaining high predictive accuracy for sustainable agriculture.
Machine Learning Framework for Formula 1 Race Strategy Optimization
An explainable machine learning framework for predicting aircraft engine Remaining Useful Life (RUL) using XGBoost and Temporal SHAP, with fidelity-based evaluation of feature importance.

A high-performance, local inference server powered by Apple's MLX framework. This solution is specifically designed for efficient model inference on Apple Silicon (M-series) chips, providing an OpenAI-compatible API for various machine learning models.

It is an intelligent web-based disease prediction system designed to assist healthcare professionals and patients in identifying potential Heart, Lung, and Brain disorders using machine learning models.It provides an easy to use interface where users can input key health parameters, and the system predicts the disease occurrence with high accuracy.
Ignite your local AI projects with Ignis, a tool designed for seamless implementation and efficient management of machine learning models.
AN AUTOMATED MACHINE LEARNING FRAMEWORK FOR CANCER CELL CLASSIFICATION
Causal machine learning framework for pharmacovigilance signal detection in electronic health records: Drug-induced acute kidney injury
An opinionated machine learning framework.

The qecc-aware-qml-trainer is a quantum-classical framework that seamlessly integrates error mitigation codes (QECC) into Quantum Machine Learning (QML) circuits. It provides real-time fidelity tracking, noise-aware training, and automated error correction deploymentaddressing the key blocker in reviews for practical QML applications.
Quantum Machine Learning Framework on Python for diverse machine learning tasks.
A business intelligence and machine learning framework that predicts surge pricing events, enabling ride-sharing platforms to shift from reactive pricing to proactive, data-driven decision-making.
Advanced framework combining 2D contaminant transport simulation (advectiondiffusion) with machine learning to classify ecological risk (Low/Medium/High) and generate dashboards, GIFs, and reports.
Previso de Churn em Telecomunicaes utilizando o Framework SEMMA. Implementao de modelos de Machine Learning com foco em otimizao de mtricas de reteno e reduo de CAC. ROC-AUC: 0.8395.

The proposed system introduces an intelligent, data-driven framework that uses machine learning techniques to predict failures and optimize the energy efficiency of air-cooled chillers. It aims to overcome the limitations of conventional maintenance practices by providing real-time insights and predictive analytics based on historical sensor data.

Machine learning analysis for the AI-Driven Digital Transformation Skills Framework, including text preprocessing, skill extraction, topic modeling (LDA), and clustering (K-means and hierarchical clustering).
A machine learning framework developed to predict human age groups using alkaline phosphatase (ALP) levels measured from blood and saliva samples under fresh and dried conditions.

ML framework for product review classification and customer segmentation using NLP, Decision Trees, KNN, and K-Means (machine-learning, data-analysis, nlp, classification, clustering, kmeans, scikit-learn, python, data-science)

A bare-metal, dependency-free Machine Learning framework written in C and Assembly. Features static memory arenas, reverse-mode Autograd, SIMD (AVX2/NEON) optimizations, and INT8 quantization for edge and TinyML environments.

MILP_GNN is a Python research codebase for learning branching strategies in Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) using machine learning. The project implements graph convolutional neural networks and multilayer perceptrons to predict effective branching variables within a branch-and-bound solver framework.
Predict traffic accident severity using advanced machine learning and explainable AI, enhancing road safety with clear insights from comprehensive data analysis.

Quantum Tensor Networks Circuits is a modular framework for building and benchmarking variational quantum circuits based on tensor networks. The framework allows for various encoding methods and ansatz topologies, thus enabling the comparison of their precision and expressibility in quantum machine learning applications.

This repository contains the complete analytical pipeline for a study on fish freshness classification. The analysis leverages advanced machine learning methods implemented within the mlr3 framework, enabling robust model training, evaluation, and comparison.

Machine Learning-based Network Intrusion Detection System using CICIDS2017 dataset with high accuracy classification of benign and malicious traffic using Random Forest, XGBoost, and Isolation Forest.
Autoware-ML is a machine learning framework for multiple tasks, supporting the full lifecycle - training, evaluation, optimization, and deployment of models with native runtime support in Autoware.

Elastic Guardian is a modular AI framework that structures machine learning projects from research and prototyping to scalable deployment. It emphasizes clean architecture, reproducible pipelines, model evaluation, optimization, and API integration to transform experimental ML workflows into production-ready systems.
Simple Framework to create game for my machine learning research testing AI

This project implements a machine learning pipeline for binary classification of drug-like compounds using ChEMBL bioactivity data. Features include molecular descriptors and fingerprints. Models such as SVM, RF, KNN, CNN, and SNN are evaluated, with classical methods achieving the best performance.
Interactive dashboard and traffic simulation for the TinyOL lightweight edge machine learning framework.
An Explainable Machine Learning-Based Framework for Fault Prediction and Isolation in Telecommunication Networks

A machine learning project that predicts diabetes-related complications such as cardiovascular disease, kidney disease, and neuropathy using patient clinical data. The project includes data cleaning, preprocessing, feature engineering, exploratory data analysis, and a multi-label classification framework.

An advanced framework for mechanical fault diagnosis using Physics-Informed Machine Learning (PiML). Combines TLS-DMD, physics-driven feature extraction, and Random Forest on the CWRU Bearing Dataset to achieve 98-99% accuracy.
DistroML is an enterprise-grade distributed machine learning training framework designed to accelerate deep learning workflows across multiple GPUs, nodes, and cloud environments.
A unified framework for tabular, time-series, and multimodal machine learning
Polygenic risk score (PGS) and machine learning framework for primary open-angle glaucoma prediction in African ancestry cohorts.
Federated machine learning framework for physical ai oncology trials.
A configurable machine learning experiment pipeline with automatic experiment tracking and model versioning.
Enterprise graph machine learning framework for billion-scale graphs for ML scientists and data scientists.

CogniLife is an advanced machine learning framework designed to identify dementia risk patterns using non-clinical determinants. By analyzing demographics, social engagement, and functional independence, this system provides a non-invasive screening methodology that bypasses the need for expensive medical imaging or laboratory tests.
A high-level orchestration and pipeline framework for quantum machine learning

This project builds a predictive analytics framework to forecast children in HHS care under the UAC Program. Using time-series and machine learning models, it converts historical data into forward-looking insights to support proactive planning and manage future care demand and system pressure.

CyberShield Ultimate is a real-time Security Operations Center (SOC) framework. Powered by Python and Machine Learning, it features live network packet capture, AI anomaly detection, active process monitoring, and threat geolocation. It includes 14 integrated security modules for file vetting, port scanning, and automated risk reporting.
A little machine learning framework I am working on as a hobby project

LEO CDP is an open-source, AI-first Customer Data Platform for building customizable, self-hosted, privacy-friendly CDP infrastructure. It unifies data collection, enables real-time analytics, audience segmentation, and personalized marketing  powered by big data and machine learning.
Hybrid ensemble machine learning and deep learning framework for accurate and explainable software cost estimation.
Distributed tensors and Machine Learning framework with GPU and MPI acceleration in Python
a framework for phylogeny-aware machine learning models
This repository contains the implementation of MFCC-GNB XtractNet, a novel hybrid machine learning framework for detecting deepfake and synthetic voice recordings
An open-source framework for machine learning and other computations on decentralized data.

A deep dive into the mathematical core of Machine Learning. Purely NumPy-based implementations of Neural Networks (MLPs) and Gradient Descent from scratch. Features an MNIST Handwritten Digit Classifier achieving ~90% accuracy without high-level frameworks like TensorFlow/PyTorch.
Discover key research papers on Quantum Machine Learning (QML) and explore transfer learning frameworks, applications, and optimization strategies.
An Open Source Machine Learning Framework for Everyone

A process-aware machine learning framework (ProtT5-XL + XGBoost) predicting protein thermostability (Tm). It uniquely simulates matrix-induced stability shifts ("Lysis Shock" in cell vs. lysate) to guide the rational design of robust affinity ligands and chromatography resins for downstream processing.
ytopt: machine-learning-based autotuning and hyperparameter optimization framework using Bayesian Optimization

This project provides a "Digital Laboratory" where users can simulate, visualize, and predict physical phenomena. It moves beyond simple exercises by using AI to approximate physical laws, showing how Machine Learning can solve differential equations faster than traditional methods.
Machine learning framework for insurance claim prediction and policyholder risk scoring

Engineered a machine learning pipeline achieving 85% accuracy in predicting customer booking behavior, and a scalable demand forecasting framework supporting capacity planning across 1,500+ daily premium lounge departures at Heathrow Terminal 3.
A set of Docker images that include popular frameworks for machine learning, data science and visualization.
A framework for privacy-preserving federated machine learning.
A Rust machine learning framework.

A cross-platform (Python/Java) agentic AI framework designed to automate clinical diagnostics. The system employs specialized autonomous agents to ingest patient data, execute machine learning inferences, and provide actionable medical decision support. Optimized for early detection of chronic and infectious diseases.
Pre-exposure risk assessment for SARS-CoV-2 using Serum protein biomarkers. Machine learning framework (KNN+GA) with 7-protein panel.
Research framework for machine learning and materials science

This repository implements a security-aware ambient intelligence framework for the detection of violent and threatening language in airline customer reviews. The proposed approach leverages advanced natural language processing (NLP) techniques and supervised machine learning models to perform multi-class classification.
Automated modeling and machine learning framework FEDOT

X-Tweet is a full-stack web application for analyzing real-time Twitter trends using NLP and machine learning. It provides insights through sentiment analysis, topic modeling, anomaly detection, influencer tracking, bot detection, and more. Built with Vue.js, Django REST Framework, PostgreSQL, and Chart.js.
An end-to-end Machine Learning Quantitative Trading framework designed for the Vietnam Stock Market, featuring strict Walk-Forward validation and realistic bt engine backtesting
A Julia machine learning framework

brpc is an Industrial-grade RPC framework using C++ Language, which is often used in high performance system such as Search, Storage, Machine learning, Advertisement, Recommendation etc. "brpc" means "better RPC".
Global machine learning glacier mass balance framework, capable of assimilating all sources of glaciological and remote sensing data

A decentralized machine learning framework that combines Federated Learning (Flower), MAML (Model Agnostic Meta-Learning), and Differential Privacy to provide personalized diagnostics. The system is optimized for resource-constrained hardware using INT8 Post-Training Static Quantization, reducing model size by 74% for ESP32/Mobile deployment.

The Product Demand Prediction System (AI-DS) is a cutting-edge analytical framework that replaces reactive inventory management with data-driven foresight. By leveraging Machine Learning and Time-Series Analysis, it forecasts requirements with high precision, mitigating the "bullwhip effect" and optimizing global supply chain margins.
An integrated computational framework combining machine learning predictions with empirical multi-omics validation to systematically map and decode tracrRNA-dependent off-target (TDO) events.

Implementation of an adaptive machine learning system for non-stationary financial data streams. The framework combines temporally diverse ensemble models with meta-heuristic optimization to dynamically adjust model influence under concept drift.
